creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
Does this patch look OK? This immediately fixes as well as resolves #218141 by adding krb5* to CONFLICTS. Tested okay here but I'd probably put it through Phabricator to be certain. It should solve the immediate pain, as this would currently smack anyone attempting a 4.4->4.5 or 4.6 DC upgrade square in the face.

Talked with some folks, and most likely the orphans got missed because "@comment " is actually being used. So using %%AD_DC%% as it's used elsewhere seems the easy answer for now.
